description_long: This is a tall, slender aluminum can with a glossy finish, featuring the iconic Red Bull branding. The can is predominantly blue and silver, with a bold red and yellow logo of two bulls charging at each other on the front. The front also displays the words 'Red Bull' in large red letters and 'Energy Drink' in smaller blue and red text. The back of the can is covered with nutritional information and product details in red and blue text. The top of the can is metallic silver with a standard pull-tab opening. The overall appearance is clean, undamaged, and typical of a commercial energy drink container.
description: A tall, glossy Red Bull energy drink can with blue, silver, and red branding, featuring a metallic pull-tab top and detailed product labeling.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Red Bull logo, two charging bulls, and prominent product branding.
description_view_1: Side view with partial logo and a large blue panel, less text visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying nutritional information and product details in red and blue text.
description_view_3: Angled side view with partial logo and blue panel, minimal text visible.
attribute_label_or_branding: Red Bull logo with two yellow bulls, large red 'Red Bull' text, blue and silver background, 'Energy Drink' in red and blue, and detailed product/nutritional information in red and blue text on the back.
